title: crepis × helvetica
intro: Crepis × helvetica, also known as hybrid hawk's beard, is a plant species that belongs to the dandelion family and is a cross between Crepis biennis and Crepis paludosa. The medicinal properties of Crepis × helvetica include its diuretic and anti-inflammatory effects, which make it useful in treating urinary tract infections and skin conditions such as eczema and acne. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to improve digestion, reduce fever, and boost the immune system, making it a popular herbal remedy for various health issues. Crepis × helvetica can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
